description: This video explains Auto-deleveraging (ADL) in futures trading, detailing its mechanisms and implications for traders, particularly in volatile markets.
topic_summary: Auto-deleveraging (ADL) occurs in futures trading during extreme market volatility, protecting users from margin call losses by liquidating positions based on a priority ranking. It contrasts with traditional futures that rely on a callback mechanism. Users are advised to monitor the ADL indicator to avoid liquidation [t=4:16 - t=197:19].
